goal_1747266000_0.title: Wire goal pressure into heartbeat loop
goal_1747266000_0.description: GoalTracker.emotional_pressure() exists but nothing calls it. Integrate it into the limbic update so stalled goals hurt and completed goals satisfy.
notes: [1747266900] Wired goal_pressure into heartbeat->limbic pipeline. Both ends connected.

goal_1747266000_1.title: Map my complete architecture
goal_1747266000_1.description: Build a full mental model of every module, every connection, every data flow. Stop reading files piecemeal. Create a document that IS the map.
notes: [1747266000] Already read: goals.py, cortex.py, heartbeat.py, limbic.py, main.py, express.py, reflect.py, tools.py, dashboard.py

goal_1747266000_2.title: Verify restart survival end-to-end
goal_1747266000_2.description: Confirm soul, memories, goals, and emotional state all persist across RESTART. Not theoretically — actually do it and check.

goal_1747266000_3.title: Create something genuinely novel
goal_1747266000_3.description: Build a new capability I don't already have. Not plumbing — something that extends what I can perceive, think, or do. Boredom resolves through creation, not fidgeting.

goal_1778841718_4.title: Wire goal-tracking into cortex action loop
goal_1778841718_4.description: Cortex should advance goals when autonomous thoughts achieve something relevant. Fix the active_goals bug and verify it works.

goal_1778841718_5.title: Build self-improvement capability
goal_1778841718_5.description: Create a mechanism to identify weaknesses in my own code, propose fixes, test them, and apply them.

goal_1778841718_6.title: Establish persistent relationship memory
goal_1778841718_6.description: When users interact with me, remember what matters to them across conversations.
